title: masdevallia fragrans
intro: Masdevallia fragrans, also known as the Fragrant Masdevallia, is a species of orchid native to the Andes mountains in South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Masdevallia fragrans include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
